samples.xml_description:
Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding. 8-bit input operand A (multiplicand). 8-bit input operand B (multiplier). 16-bit output product. Bit width for inputs A and B. Bit width for output product.

Initialize

product [15:0] = 16'b0;

Loop through each bit of the multiplier:

for (int i = 0; i < BIT_WIDTH; i++) {

  • If the current bit of the multiplier is 1:

    if (B[i] == 1'b1) {

    • Accumulate the product:

      product = product + (A << i);
    }

Reset the multiplicand for the next iteration:

A = A << 1; }
